data.body: PASS 1 / A1 (anti-slop, over-engineering, NIH) review of Cluster 2 recorded. Net: the consolidation is well-scoped and YAGNI-respecting — affirmed. One accuracy finding: the plan's quoted backoff constants do not match the code (base/factor/cap differ; CAS reuses the shared `_BACKOFF_FACTOR`), which is the load-bearing premise for the unify-vs-bespoke decision.
